add $t0, $zero, $zero         0x00004020  00000000000000000100000000100000
j frog                        0x08000004  00001000000000000000000000000100
addi $t0, $t0, 5              0x21080005  00100001000010000000000000000101
mul $t0, $t1, $t2             0x012A4018  00000001001010100100000000011000
j frog                        0x08000004  00001000000000000000000000000100
